arts.ttl: Inside a week at Man United: Ruben Amorim has looked to lift the gloom with families and face-painting but won't U-turn on back-three plans ahead of their Liverpool litmus test
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AND JOE BERNSTEIN: Amorim laughs at his own suggestion of premature ageing but is deadly serious about the weight on his shoulders heading into Sunday's game.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: Winter exit planned as Arne Slot approves star's La Liga move in January
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arne Slot agree that one of their stars can leave in the January transfer window amidst interest from a La Liga club.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester United: Best bets for Sunday’s Premier League and Championship games
arts.sum: Our betting expert with tips for Anfield, Fulham against Ipswich, and Sunderland-Portsmouth in the second tier PLUS a Serie A angle

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes 'difficult' Liverpool injury admission as Harvey Elliott and Federico Chiesa wait
arts.sum: A number of Liverpool players have been used sparingly since returning from injury in December

arts.ttl: Weather warning puts Liverpool - Manchester United clash at risk - AS USA
arts.sum: Liverpool’s much-anticipated Premier League game against Manchester United is under threat after areas of the north-west of England were put under an amber weather warning on Saturday. If the Manchester United game is postponed too, Liverpool will be facing major fixture congestion in the coming months.

arts.ttl: Man Utd injuries: Every player out of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Every Man Utd player missing from Sunday's trip to Liverpool in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injuries: Every player out of Man Utd clash
arts.sum: The Liverpool players missing from Sunday's clash with Man Utd in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Rashford rejects bumper PAY RISE to leave Man Utd
arts.sum: Rashford announced that he is open to a “new challenge”, effectively putting himself on the transfer market after he was dropped from the Manchester City clash in the Premier League by new head coach Ruben Amorim. Marcus Rashford is becoming an increasingly large problem for Manchester United as the January transfer window progresses.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest: Liverpool table offer in bid to stop Real Madrid in January transfer window
arts.sum: Liverpool counter Real Madrid's attempt to lure Trent Alexander-Arnold away from Anfield with a new lucrative contract offer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: January window target set to sign for Premier League rival as Arne Slot looks to win title
arts.sum: Liverpool are likely to miss out on a key left-back target to a Premier League rival, as they look to replace veteran Andy Robertson in the near future.
